rationale: The citing paper references Zeithammer (2006) only in its literature review and summary table as part of a broader set of studies on price-based, nondifferentiated forward auctions. The citation is used to contrast prior work on bidder valuation and forward-looking behavior with this paper's different focus on bidder quality in buyer-determined reverse procurement auctions. The paper does not adopt Zeithammer's model, measures, or empirical strategy, and it does not return to this citation in hypothesis development or analysis.
